Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Off Calendar

Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel For Plaintiff In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted.

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment signed.
